use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) THAT IS ANAPLASTIC LYMPHOMA KINASE (ALK)-POSITIVE
TREATMENT OF PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 1 YEAR OF AGE AND OLDER AND YOUNG ADULTS WITH RELAPSED OR REFRACTORY, SYSTEMIC ANAPLASTIC LARGE CELL LYMPHOMA (ALCL) THAT IS ANAPLASTIC LYMPHOMA KINASE (ALK)-POSITIVE

METHOD OF REVERSING OR INHIBITING THE PROGRESS OF UNRESECTABLE, RECURRENT, OR REFRACTORY INFLAMMATORY MYOFIBROBLASTIC TUMOR (IMT) THAT IS ALK-POSITIVE IN ADULT AND PEDIATRIC PATIENTS 1 YEAR OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
1.1 ALK- or ROS1-Positive Metastatic Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer
XALKORI is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC)
whose tumors are anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK) or ROS1-positive as detected by an FDA-approved test
[see Dosage and Administr...
